title: AltmanAI SuperAgent 1.0 — Rebrand & .github Governance Refresh
summary: Rebranded the agent to AltmanAI SuperAgent 1.0 and executed a full governance refresh of altmanAI/.github: scrubbed all legacy ChatGPT/GLASSKEY-E456 references repo-wide, published organization profile (profile/README.md), governance model (GOVERNANCE.md), contributor standards (CONTRIBUTING.md), security policy (SECURITY.md), code of conduct (CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md), support docs (SUPPORT.md), PR template, four issue templates, and two manual-trigger workflow drafts. Removed six superseded legacy duplicate files (PR #3) after the primary refresh (PR #1). altmanai-dotgithub-r1.zip retained as historical archive per founder decision.
custody_line: Digital record — no local device save. Verified via GitHub-hosted merge commits (git SHA-1): 32559b1bd1bfac9a6c29fec756fbb9ad885300fc (PR #1), 1ab170d2b3f9e76400f7325655d6735109cdeac0 (PR #3). Payload SHA-256 computed and recorded above.

poc_tags.role: Founder & CEO — authorization, approval (All Clear for Impact)
AI Technology Partner — execution, drafting, governance preparation
